title: Happy Halloween
description: A small Datapacks for Your Halloween!
body:
## **About** 🛠️

### STICKMAN API IS REQUIRED ON VERSION 1.0.1+. GET STICKMAN API **[HERE](https://modrinth.com/mod/stickman-api)**

This Datapack adds some Advancements to improve your Halloween feeling in Minecraft!

## **Content ✨**
6 New Advancements
Kill a Skeleton Horse with a Channaling Trident to get a "Ignited Ghost Lantern", right-click to summon a zombie horse


## **Updates ✉️**

There are always small Updates fixing some Bugs. There are Big Updates like 1.0 adding new Content. The First Versions of This Pack are not Really precised, so please use the Latest Versions!
